names.pt: rã verde dos campos de arroz

description: Interactive Thailand map for Creatures of the Deep — fish, creatures, items, and the map monster.
intro: Thailand is a smaller area than the previous zones (the same size as Great Lakes). As a result, it is quite easy to explore it and quickly become familiar with the main fishing spots. The difficulty varies considerably, with some common fish being fairly hard to find. Click on a fish in the side menu to see the details.
name: Thailand

names.pt: protetor de cabeça de muay thai

title: Thailand map
